chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

text: 2382 - وَ سَأَلَهُ اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ اَلصَّيْقَلِ : عَنْ دَجَاجِ مَكَّةَ وَ طَيْرِهَا فَقَالَ «مَا لَمْ يَصُفَّ فَكُلْهُ وَ مَا كَانَ يَصُفُّ فَخَلِّ سَبِيلَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2382 - Al-Hasan ibn al-Sayqal asked Imam (as) about the chickens and birds of Mecca.
Imam (as) said: "What does not glide (in flight), you may eat it, and what glides, let it go."
